list.name: convoy_id
list.label: Convoy
list.query: SELECT id AS __value, CONCAT(LEFT(title, 80), ' [', status, ']') AS __text FROM ${database}.issues WHERE issue_type = 'convoy' ORDER BY CASE WHEN status LIKE 'staged%' THEN 0 WHEN status = 'open' THEN 1 WHEN status = 'in_progress' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, priority ASC, created_at DESC

panels.title: Convoy Flow
panels.description: Convoy and its tracked/child beads across rigs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT id, CONCAT(issue_type, ': ', LEFT(title, 50)) AS title, CONCAT(status, ' (P', priority, ')') AS subtitle, CASE WHEN id = '${convoy_id}' THEN 1.0 WHEN status = 'closed' THEN 0.2 WHEN status = 'in_progress' THEN 0.6 ELSE 0.8 END AS mainstat FROM ${database}.issues WHERE id = '${convoy_id}' OR id IN (SELECT d.issue_id FROM ${database}.dependencies d WHERE d.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'parent-child') UNION SELECT i.id, CONCAT(i.issue_type, ': ', LEFT(i.title, 50)) AS title, CONCAT(i.status, ' (P', i.priority, ')') AS subtitle, CASE WHEN i.status = 'closed' THEN 0.2 WHEN i.status = 'in_progress' THEN 0.6 ELSE 0.8 END AS mainstat FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:hq:%' UNION SELECT i.id, CONCAT(i.issue_type, ': ', LEFT(i.title, 50)), CONCAT(i.status, ' (P', i.priority, ')'), CASE WHEN i.status = 'closed' THEN 0.2 WHEN i.status = 'in_progress' THEN 0.6 ELSE 0.8 END FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sfgastown:%' UNION SELECT i.id, CONCAT(i.issue_type, ': ', LEFT(i.title, 50)), CONCAT(i.status, ' (P', i.priority, ')'), CASE WHEN i.status = 'closed' THEN 0.2 WHEN i.status = 'in_progress' THEN 0.6 ELSE 0.8 END FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN lora_forge.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:lora_forge:%' UNION SELECT i.id, CONCAT(i.issue_type, ': ', LEFT(i.title, 50)), CONCAT(i.status, ' (P', i.priority, ')'), CASE WHEN i.status = 'closed' THEN 0.2 WHEN i.status = 'in_progress' THEN 0.6 ELSE 0.8 END FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sf_workflows.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sf_workflows:%'

SELECT CONCAT('${convoy_id}', '->', d.issue_id) AS id, '${convoy_id}' AS source, d.issue_id AS target, d.type AS mainstat FROM ${database}.dependencies d WHERE d.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'parent-child' AND d.issue_id IN (SELECT id FROM ${database}.issues) UNION SELECT CONCAT('${convoy_id}', '->', SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1)) AS id, '${convoy_id}' AS source, SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) AS target, 'tracks' AS mainstat FROM ${database}.dependencies d WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks'
SELECT id, title, status, priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(assignee,''),'—') AS owner, created_at, LEFT(description, 300) AS description FROM ${database}.issues WHERE id = '${convoy_id}'

SELECT ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('closed','completed') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / GREATEST(COUNT(*), 1), 1) AS value FROM (SELECT child.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN ${database}.issues child ON d.issue_id = child.id WHERE d.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'parent-child' UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:hq:%' UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sfgastown:%' UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN lora_forge.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:lora_forge:%' UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sf_workflows.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sf_workflows:%') t

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN ${database}.issues child ON d.issue_id = child.id WHERE d.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'parent-child') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ${database}.dependencies d WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks') AS value

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT child.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN ${database}.issues child ON d.issue_id = child.id WHERE d.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'parent-child' AND child.status IN ('closed','completed') UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:hq:%' AND i.status IN ('closed','completed') UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sfgastown:%' AND i.status IN ('closed','completed') UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN lora_forge.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:lora_forge:%' AND i.status IN ('closed','completed') UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sf_workflows.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sf_workflows:%' AND i.status IN ('closed','completed')) t

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT child.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN ${database}.issues child ON d.issue_id = child.id WHERE d.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'parent-child' AND child.status = 'in_progress' UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:hq:%' AND i.status = 'in_progress' UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sfgastown:%' AND i.status = 'in_progress' UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN lora_forge.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:lora_forge:%' AND i.status = 'in_progress' UNION ALL SELECT i.status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sf_workflows.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sf_workflows:%' AND i.status = 'in_progress') t

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT child.id FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN ${database}.issues child ON d.issue_id = child.id WHERE d.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'parent-child' AND child.id IN (SELECT issue_id FROM ${database}.blocked_issues) UNION ALL SELECT i.id FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:hq:%' AND i.id IN (SELECT issue_id FROM hq.blocked_issues) UNION ALL SELECT i.id FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sfgastown:%' AND i.id IN (SELECT issue_id FROM sfgastown.blocked_issues) UNION ALL SELECT i.id FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN lora_forge.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:lora_forge:%' AND i.id IN (SELECT issue_id FROM lora_forge.blocked_issues) UNION ALL SELECT i.id FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sf_workflows.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sf_workflows:%' AND i.id IN (SELECT issue_id FROM sf_workflows.blocked_issues)) t

panels.title: Child Beads (click ID to drill into graph)

targets.rawSql: SELECT '${database}' AS rig, child.id, child.title, child.issue_type, child.status, child.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(child.assignee,''),'—') AS assignee, child.created_at, LEFT(child.description, 200) AS description FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN ${database}.issues child ON d.issue_id = child.id WHERE d.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'parent-child' UNION ALL SELECT 'hq', i.id, i.title, i.issue_type, i.status, i.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee,''),'—'), i.created_at, LEFT(i.description, 200) FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN hq.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:hq:%' UNION ALL SELECT 'sfgastown', i.id, i.title, i.issue_type, i.status, i.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee,''),'—'), i.created_at, LEFT(i.description, 200) FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sfgastown.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sfgastown:%' UNION ALL SELECT 'lora_forge', i.id, i.title, i.issue_type, i.status, i.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee,''),'—'), i.created_at, LEFT(i.description, 200) FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN lora_forge.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:lora_forge:%' UNION ALL SELECT 'sf_workflows', i.id, i.title, i.issue_type, i.status, i.priority, COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee,''),'—'), i.created_at, LEFT(i.description, 200) FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN sf_workflows.issues i ON i.id = SUBSTRING_INDEX(d.depends_on_id, ':', -1) WHERE d.issue_id = '${convoy_id}' AND d.type = 'tracks' AND d.depends_on_id LIKE 'external:sf_workflows:%' ORDER BY priority ASC, status DESC

SELECT blocker.id AS blocker_id, LEFT(blocker.title, 60) AS blocker_title, blocker.status AS blocker_status, d.type AS relationship, blocked.id AS blocked_id, LEFT(blocked.title, 60) AS blocked_title, blocked.status AS blocked_status FROM ${database}.dependencies d JOIN ${database}.issues blocker ON d.depends_on_id = blocker.id JOIN ${database}.issues blocked ON d.issue_id = blocked.id WHERE d.type = 'blocks' AND (d.issue_id IN (SELECT dd.issue_id FROM ${database}.dependencies dd WHERE dd.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND dd.type = 'parent-child') OR d.depends_on_id IN (SELECT dd.issue_id FROM ${database}.dependencies dd WHERE dd.depends_on_id = '${convoy_id}' AND dd.type = 'parent-child')) ORDER BY blocker.id
